self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can keep older adopted Architecture records inside the canonical truth anchor without retrofitting new decision sidecars onto them.
self_improvement.mechanism: The adopted slice adds a bounded markdown fallback in the adoption reader and checker coverage for the legacy adopted records.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this DEEP slice, the four 2026-03-22 adopted Architecture artifacts failed canonical focus because the reader required a modern adoption decision JSON.
self_improvement.expected_effect: Legacy adopted Architecture records will resolve as truthful current heads instead of masquerading as broken historical drift.

decision.rationale: The slice is narrow, shared, and repairs a real legacy-truth blind spot without broadening into queue policy or Runtime history.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
